title: ebenus foliosa
intro: Ebenus foliosa, also known as the dwarf cornel, is a deciduous shrub species in the family Cornaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ebenus foliosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, making it a valuable herbal remedy in folk medicine.
